characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion. Short dark hair, clean-shaven.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैंने Supernova app open किया। [I opened the Supernova app.]
Character A says: और यहाँ मैंने अपना daily speaking lesson select किया, like interview practice. [And here I selected my daily speaking lesson, like interview practice.]
Character A says: And then I started talking to the AI tutor. [And then I started talking to the AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by showing the app interface immediately.
- Introduces the core problem/solution: selecting a practical, real-world speaking lesson.
- Sets a casual, relatable tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova App
Speaking English with confidence is simple

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Then I practiced real-world situations with the AI. [Then I practiced real-world situations with the AI.]
Character A says: और ये मेरी mistakes का detailed breakdown है। [And this is the detailed breakdown of my mistakes.]
Character A says: This is the final feedback. [This is the final feedback.]
Character A says: So yes, now... [So yes, now...]
Character A says: You have... [You have...]
Character A says: Yep. [Yep.]
Character A says: Improvement. [Improvement.]
Character A says: This is what real practice looks like. [This is what real practice looks like.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core value proposition: AI feedback and real-world practice.
- Matches the slightly hesitant, authentic pacing of the original screencast.
- Builds confidence by showing tangible improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova App
Speaking English with confidence is simple

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Like I practice speaking a lot on daily basis. [Like I practice speaking a lot on daily basis.]
Character A says: And Supernova has for sure helped me in that regard. [And Supernova has for sure helped me in that regard.]
Character A says: And I'm truly loving it for this. [And I'm truly loving it for this.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Emphasizes the importance of a daily learning habit.
- Provides a strong, personal endorsement of the app.
- Ends on a warm, encouraging note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova App
Speaking English with confidence is simple
